_note: Jonah pericope → verse-range map (SC-0032; the held-out generality test). start/end are HEBREW versification (BHSA-native); bcv is English. NOTE bhsa_book is the ETCBC BHSA Latin book name 'Jona' (NOT 'Jonah') — verified against the tf/2021 `book` feature in Phase 1 (SC-0033); Ruth was identical in Latin/English so SC-0032 didn't surface this. Jonah's Heb/Eng numbering diverges at the fish: English 1:17 = Hebrew 2:1, so English 2:1-10 = Hebrew 2:2-11. Run via: extract_bhsa.py J01 --pericopes extractor/pericopes.jonah.json. J01 (1:1-3) shipped (SC-0038). J02-J05 boundaries RULED by Marcia 2026-06-10 (SC-0039): the psalm stands ALONE as J03 — purely the poem (Heb 2:3-10 = Eng 2:2-9), no narrative frame verse inside it; the swallowing (Heb 2:1 = Eng 1:17) closes the storm pericope as its resolution, the one-line prayer-intro (Heb 2:2 = Eng 2:1) closes J02 with it, and the release (Heb 2:11 = Eng 2:10) opens J04. Heb ranges verified at extraction.
